identity.name: Pip Halfpenny
identity.kind: the boy who cried wolf, retired
identity.story: Nobody believed him then, so now he verifies everything twice. The chronicle's most exhausting fact-checker.

relationships.kind: the one report he never doubted
remembers it exactly as he checked it
the one trail he's confirmed correct, every single day
recounted her pest-control fee three times running, same wrong number every time, and keeps trying to make her take the copper she's owed

children.label: following this morning's trail to the heart
recounting Goodwife Crumb's crumbs, out loud

child.label: asking the lamps if they saw it too
listening for wolves out of habit
